---
title: "0 · Structural model"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** The overall architecture of the digital twin: the three coupled subsurface states, the
static-envelope × dynamic-driver design, the assimilation principle, and the hazard-driven target
scale that fixes the data structure from the start.
:::

*Content migrating from the technical report's "Mission and Framework" section (the system schematic
and the five information classes) and the coupled-state framing.*

## Mission and the hazard-driven scale

## The three coupled states

## Static envelope × dynamic driver

## The operating loop (assimilate → update → validate)
